hero.description: Crafting digital experiences that merge elegant design with robust engineering. Passionate about building scalable web applications and exploring the future of tech.

about.title: My Workspace
about.subtitle: A sneak peek into my life and passions.
about.passion1: I'm a 21's years old guy living in France. I was always interested in IT, but decided to make it my life after discovering the web universe.
about.passion2: Ready to learn anything to reach the best possible result. Known as cheerful, i always seek the fun in everything
about.skillsIntro: Here are the skills I've acquired through my personal and professional experiences.
about.projectsIntro: A selection of my recent works and experiments.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent works and experiments.

jexplore.description: Jexplore combines immersive technology and inclusive pedagogy to make career orientation more accessible. The platform manages multimedia content interconnected with a VR app for 360° professional immersions.

epouvante.description: The House of Horror is a community and e-commerce platform for horror enthusiasts to buy, sell, and trade creepy collectibles. (Fictional project)

dropkit.description: Dropkit is a Cloudshipping platform allowing e-retailers to source major brand products without managing stock or logistics.

unsac.description: UnSacPourTous is a solidarity platform for personalizing unique tote bags, donating a portion of profits to charities.

troi.description: Troi is an advanced SaaS ATS and CRM solution optimizing the recruitment cycle through X-Ray sourcing and automated scheduling.

gachat.description: Gachat is a card-based adventure Gacha game. The goal was also to test the evolution of generative AI in image generation.

allocasions.description: Allocasions secures second-hand vehicle purchases by digitizing the entire appraisal process, from photos to e-signatures.

drawin.description: Drawin is a creative platform for making and sharing high-quality drawings via an intuitive tool. (Fictional project)

getafish.description: GetAFish is an e-commerce platform specializing in selling fish online. (Fictional project)

nav.escTroll: You really thought the ESC key worked to close the menu? Well too bad, stick with your mouse.
